ground_truth.title: Audiovector R10 Arreté loudspeaker, the Full Review.
ground_truth.author: Dato' Danon Han
ground_truth.main_content: I remembered having heard a special pair of loudspeakers with all the prized 'audiophile' attributes, used at the main audio system for the recent DS Audio launch event at Audio Perfectionist, MALAYSIA. I investigated and discovered they were a pair of the Audiovector R8 loudspeakers from DENMARK. The Danish High End loudspeaker company (based in Copenhagen, DENMARK) was founded by Mr. Ole Klifoth (Father, and Head Designer) in 1979, and that till today the company's original vision remained unchanged but to 'produce High Quality, Natural Sounding loudspeakers for Music Lovers and Audiophiles around the world', currently, under Mr. Mads Klifoth (Son), CEO and owner, and still stubbornly a Family-Owned Company with Family Value. The Audiovector R10 Arreté loudspeakers retail at RM826,000/ UK £127,500 / Euro €147,500 / US $165,000 per pair. The said loudspeakers were 'Danish Made Special' and I asked if possible, to send them into my Audio Den for a full review. The cabinet was Teardrop-shaped and vacuum-formed of High-Density Hardwood Fiberboard and featured Precision-Milled CNC 6061 Aircraft-Grade Aluminum Baffles for structural integrity and vibration control. The team introduced me to the Freedom Grounding which was the second-generation grounding system that routes away motion-induced distortion from all thirteen drivers chassis per said loudspeaker, contributing to a lower noise floor and a quieter background for the music. The Damping Factor Adjustment's rear-panel switch allowed users to tailor the speaker's damping to match different types of amplifiers. The Dual AMT Tweeter System featured a primary Air Motion Transformer tweeter (3kHz-53kHz) and a dedicated hyper tweeter (20kHz-53kHz) to enhance spatial detail and provide a three-dimensional soundstage. The Line Array Bass System consisted of eight rear-mounted 5-inch long-throw bass drivers that worked in concert to provide the surface area equivalent to a single 15-inch woofer. The Accelerated Force Concept technology employed Custom Concertina Suspension and Carbon-Fibre/Titanium Cones to Accelerate and Decelerate the drivers with Exceptional Precision for Fast Transient Response and Low Distortion. After a decisive positioning for the Audiovector R10 Arreté loudspeakers, I was rewarded with an Open and almost Borderless Soundscape. The resulted Soundscape was Massive, Enveloping and Surround-Like that Dwarfted the slightly above Five Foot Loudspeakers. Through the Audiovector R10 Arreté loudspeakers, Ms. Anne-Sophie Mutter's instrumentation was well imaged: Focused, Textured, Weighted, Palpable, Dense, Delineated, and in three Dimensions. The Audiovector R10 Arreté loudspeakers projected that Closely-Miked instrumentation with Scale and Realism, and thus showcased their Differing Dynamics (Macro and Micro) and Resolution. The speakers projected the recording venue's known 'Big, Open, and Transparent Soundfield', with 'Wall to Wall and Floor to Ceiling Spaciousness'. The Audiovector R10 Arreté loudspeakers were Transparent and Articulate in projecting the different Instruments and their respective Differences. They made Audible every Element in the Recording, including the intended Natural and 'Live' Acoustical Sound. The speakers proved their Clarity into the Soundstage, and Highlighted the individual artist, instrument, play and voice. Listening to the Musical Presentation through them was like Watching a 'Musical Drama', with 'Very Little Mental Convincing'. I did not feel the need to judge the fidelity of the said loudspeakers, but allowed myself to just immerse into the Room-Filling Emotion, Atmosphere and Energy of a 'Thunderous Musical Drama'. The said loudspeakers projected a Believable, Emotional and Soul-Stirring presentation that reminded me of the performance and transparency Exclusive only to the Very Best of Ultra End Loudspeakers. The Audiovector R10 Arreté loudspeakers should be the Benchmark and Standard of Ultra End Loudspeakers at that Price Point! SPECIFICATIONS: Type: 5-way Floorstanding Loudspeaker, Frequency Response: 21 Hz – 53 kHz, Sensitivity: 90 dB/W, Impedance: 8 Ohms nominal, 5 Ohms minimum, Drivers: 8 x 5" bass, 2 x 6.5" lower midrange, 1 x 6.5" midrange, 1 x AMT main tweeter + 1 x AMT hyper tweeter, Dimensions: 156 × 36.5 × 62.7 cm, Weight: Approx. 95 kg per speaker.
